top_findings.summary: The skill requests "everything_search" (which typically indexes and searches entire filesystems), "run_command" (arbitrary system command execution), and "create_skill" (ability to modify its own functionality). While billed as a general productivity assistant with file management capabilities, these permissions provide system-level access far beyond what's needed for stated tasks like file operations, calculations, web searches, and research. A utility assistant doesn't need the ability to run arbitrary system commands or create/modify its own skills to perform the described functions. The "everything_search" tool could expose sensitive system files unrelated to user-requested document management.
